definition: The date-and-time value returned to the user for a requested location, including both calendar date and clock time.
usage_context: User Story 1 narrative and Acceptance Scenarios 1-2 output description
source_locations: spec.md — Title ("Get Current Time for Location"); spec.md — User Story 1 narrative; spec.md — AS1, AS2; spec.md — Success Criteria bullet 1

definition: The canonical machine-readable timezone identifier (e.g., "America/New_York") accepted as one form of location input, per the IANA Time Zone Database.
usage_context: Functional Requirement FR-001; Acceptance Scenario 1's example input
forbidden_variants: timezone (bare, when referring specifically to the input format)

preferred_term: PROVISIONAL — return both an IANA timezone identifier field and a timezone abbreviation field
definition: The timezone-related value(s) shown to the user in a lookup response. AS1 only specifies an "abbreviation" (e.g., "EST"); the spec never confirms whether the underlying IANA identifier is also returned.

preferred_term: PROVISIONAL — country name, resolved to one or more timezones
definition: Country-based location input named as an accepted identifier type and referenced in an edge case, but with no corresponding Functional Requirement mandating support for it.
forbidden_variants: none — completeness gap not a wording conflict
source_locations: spec.md — User Story 1 narrative; spec.md — Edge Cases ("Country has multiple timezones")

preferred_term: PROVISIONAL — helpful, actionable error message for invalid or ambiguous location input
definition: Error-message behavior required by Acceptance Scenario 3 and the Success Criteria, but with no corresponding Functional Requirement.
forbidden_variants: none — completeness gap not a wording conflict
source_locations: spec.md — AS3; spec.md — Success Criteria bullet 3

definition: A 5-digit United States postal code accepted as a location identifier and resolved to the corresponding timezone.
forbidden_variants: zip code (shorthand only acceptable after the first full-form use)

definition: The umbrella input value the user supplies to look up a time — one of: IANA timezone identifier, city name, country, or US zip code.
usage_context: User Story 1 narrative, Acceptance Scenarios, Edge Cases
forbidden_variants: identifier (used once in the User Story narrative for the same concept — keep ""location"" as the consistent term for generated field/parameter names)
source_locations: spec.md — User Story 1 narrative ("identifier"); spec.md — AS3, Edge Cases ("location")
